keyEvents.text: Goal! Australia 0, Egypt 1. Emam Ashour (Egypt) header from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Karim Hafez with a cross following a set piece situation.
Substitution, Australia. Kai Trewin replaces Jordan Bos because of an injury.
Own Goal by Mohamed Hany, Egypt. Australia 1, Egypt 1.
Substitution, Egypt. Haissem Hassan replaces Mostafa Zico.
Substitution, Egypt. Hossam Abdelmaguid replaces Hamdi Fathy.
Substitution, Australia. Ajdin Hrustic replaces Cristian Volpato.
Substitution, Australia. Mohamed Touré replaces Nestory Irankunda.
Substitution, Egypt. Trezeguet replaces Karim Hafez because of an injury.
Substitution, Australia. Paul Okon-Engstler replaces Aiden O'Neill.
Substitution, Australia. Awer Mabil replaces Connor Metcalfe.
Haissem Hassan (Egypt) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Egypt. Hamza Abdelkarim replaces Omar Marmoush.
Substitution, Australia. Mathew Ryan replaces Patrick Beach.
Yasser Ibrahim (Egypt) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Egypt. Mahmoud Saber replaces Marwan Attia.
Goal! Argentina 1, Cabo Verde 0. Lionel Messi (Argentina) left footed shot from the right side of the six yard box to the top right corner. Assisted by Lisandro Martínez with a through ball.
Goal! Argentina 1, Cabo Verde 1. Deroy Duarte (Cabo Verde) right footed shot from a difficult angle on the right to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Ryan Mendes.
Substitution, Argentina. Julián Alvarez replaces Lautaro Martínez.
Substitution, Argentina. Nico González replaces Thiago Almada.
Substitution, Cabo Verde. Jamiro Monteiro replaces Laros Duarte.
Substitution, Cabo Verde. Dailon Livramento replaces Nuno da Costa.
Kevin Pina (Cabo Verde) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Cabo Verde. Willy Semedo replaces Ryan Mendes.
Substitution, Cabo Verde. Hélio Varela replaces Jovane Cabral.
Substitution, Argentina. Leandro Paredes replaces Rodrigo De Paul.
Substitution, Argentina. Nicolás Tagliafico replaces Facundo Medina because of an injury.

Goal! Argentina 2, Cabo Verde 1. Lisandro Martínez (Argentina) left footed shot from the right side of the box to the top right corner. Assisted by Alexis Mac Allister with a headed pass following a corner.
Substitution, Cabo Verde. Yannick Semedo replaces Deroy Duarte.
Substitution, Cabo Verde. Gilson Benchimol replaces Kevin Pina.
Goal! Argentina 2, Cabo Verde 2. Sidny Cabral (Cabo Verde) right footed shot from the left side of the box to the top right corner. Assisted by Yannick Semedo.
Substitution, Argentina. Gonzalo Montiel replaces Nahuel Molina.
Own Goal by Diney Borges, Cabo Verde. Argentina 3, Cabo Verde 2.
Gonzalo Montiel (Argentina) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Colombia. Luis Suárez replaces Jhon Córdoba because of an injury.
Jhon Arias (Colombia) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Ghana. Alidu Seidu replaces Marvin Senaya because of an injury.
Goal! Colombia 1, Ghana 0. Jhon Arias (Colombia) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Luis Suárez with a cross.
Substitution, Colombia. Richard Ríos replaces James Rodríguez.
Caleb Yirenkyi (Ghana) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Ghana. Abdul Fatawu replaces Iñaki Williams.
Substitution, Ghana. Elisha Owusu replaces Kwasi Sibo because of an injury.
Abdul Fatawu (Ghana) is shown the yellow card.
Substitution, Colombia. Juan Fernando Quintero replaces Jhon Arias.
Alidu Seidu (Ghana) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Richard Ríos (Colombia) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Ghana. Ernest Nuamah replaces Jordan Ayew.
Substitution, Ghana. Prince Adu replaces Caleb Yirenkyi.
